events.name: Undisputable Champions of Comedy
events.description: The Stranger presents a stand-up showcase featuring a lineup of touring and regional comedians competing for the title.

events.name: Seattle Kraken vs. Chicago Blackhawks
events.description: NHL hockey action as the Seattle Kraken face off against the Chicago Blackhawks at home.

events.name: Lacuna Coil: Sleepless Empire Tour
events.description: Italian gothic metal band Lacuna Coil brings their Sleepless Empire Tour to Seattle with special guests Escape the Fate and VOWWS.

events.name: Shen Yun 2026
events.description: A spectacular performance featuring classical Chinese dance, live orchestra, and dazzling animated backdrops telling ancient legends of love, loss, humor and valor.
events.location: Marion Oliver McCaw Hall, Seattle Center

events.name: Robin Hood (ASL Interpreted Performance)
events.description: A fresh take on the classic tale with ASL interpretation. A wannabe king, lawless law enforcement, and the rich hoarding wealth—it's dark times in Nottingham until a hero emerges from Sherwood Forest.

events.name: Easter Sunday Celebrations
events.description: Brunches, community events, and spring celebrations throughout Seattle.

events.name: The Office Trivia Night
events.description: A themed trivia night focused on The Office TV series with prizes and group participation.

events.name: Open Mic Night
events.description: Local performers take the stage in a casual setting with rotating acts.

events.name: Les Misérables
events.description: A touring production of the beloved musical featuring large-scale staging and a full orchestra. Runs through April 19.

events.name: Seattle Kraken Home Game
events.description: NHL hockey action at Climate Pledge Arena.

events.name: Seattle Cherry Blossom & Japanese Cultural Festival
events.description: The 51st annual festival celebrating Japanese heritage with cultural performances, food vendors, art exhibits, and activities. Runs through April 12.
events.location: Seattle Center (Armory, Fisher Pavilion, Exhibition Hall)

events.name: Seattle Mariners vs. Houston Astros
events.description: Opening home series as the Mariners face the Astros. Four-game series runs through April 13.

events.name: Washington State Spring Fair
events.description: Rides, food vendors, agricultural exhibits, and carnival fun. First of two weekends.

events.name: Seattle Kraken Home Game
events.description: NHL hockey action at Climate Pledge Arena.

events.name: Yuri's Night
events.description: North America's biggest space-themed dance party transforms the Museum into a 21+ intergalactic nightclub celebrating real and imagined spaceflight with music, dancing, cosplay, art, and astrotalk.
